name: Cubic Gate
overview: A legendary 3-inch cube that provides planar access and transportation.

properties.physical_description: This cube is 3 inches across and radiates palpable magical energy
properties.planar_keying: The six sides of the cube are each keyed to a different plane of existence, one of which is the Material Plane. The other sides are linked to planes determined by the DM.

gate_spell.description: Pressing one side of the cube, you cast Gate, opening a portal to the plane of existence keyed to that side

plane_shift.description: Pressing one side of the cube twice, you cast Plane Shift, transporting the targets to the plane of existence keyed to that side

activation: As a Magic action, you can expend 1 of the cube's charges to cast one of the following spells using the cube
